title: Back of my Mind
lyricsText:
[Verse]

Uh, know what I mean when I start to bust down
Know what I mean when I start to spit now
Shooting all of these rhymes, time to get down
Now gotta evacuate all these premises, quick, how
Bitch, quit playing, just better quit now
What the fuck you think? You gonna be good now?
No one finna wear your shoes, go on drink some booze
Spittin quick for quick views, just let me get through
Who you be, tryna get through, not knowing what I've been through
You're me, we should want the same thing
Thick and thin, this shit is wearing thin
Like my patience, come on doc, who you really testing?
Son, come on, let's have a chat
See, I really shouldn't ever call you that
Considering you ain't got a father (nope)
He already left you, I see why, why bother?
Dissing on my dad? Cause you're me you ain't got him either
Why you wasting time hating on you, me and you ain't got difference (wait)
Heres an inference, you so damn negative
But what I wanna know, what you tryna achieve with this?
Listen here you little shit, I'm the superior one
You mean less than shit stains, spittin words you call rhymes
Damn, &like you get gas time
What I hate most bout you is why you still shit on that mic?
Man, that's what you hate? You breaking in my gate
Asses like you jus' make me go irate
Got enough on my plate (yeah, I can tell)
Bitch, fuck you, go ruin someone elses day already man
Damn, already do, remember I'm you
Each of "our" songs is fucking fuck shit in others ears
I don't want part in that gay shit, I don't know with you but I'm better
(Fuck yourself already)
See, each time I release the disses go for you
I don't understand why its always me I hate
The worse part? Out of everyone who hurt me I hate you most
You're the reason I still make "shit", to spite you
Hey man, watch your temper
I've gotta say, its an honor to be hated
If you didn't hate me, I wouldn't be here
Its that hate that keeps this part of you alive
(Hahahaha) (wait wait wait wait)
Wait, what, hold on back up
"That hate keeping you alive"
So if I ignore you, this all goes away
Wait, fuck, me doing this keeps you alive& (damn right)
Damn right, its your fault
Your petty ass music shit caused all of this
Without you, I wouldn't be here
If only you actually were normal then you got no issues (hahahaha)
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Be Gone
lyricsText:
[Verse]

When I open up my I eyes I see her
(I see her)
Serenity inside my spirt
I've opened to my life for so long
(So long)
I've forgotten what It's like to see right
So let's be gone
(So let's be gone)
Girl you're so far away
(You're so far)
How am I still able to hear you
So let's be gone
(So let's be gone)
What's the point of caring
If no one even understands the feeling
(Noooo)
Understand the lyrics for who they are
You know what I mean I've left this past all for a dream
Trying to be the one made out to be
What I'm supposed to be
But it's so hard mentally after my friends just up and left me
I guess nothing really last forever or so I've learned
You're playing this song but I doubt if you really hear it
Man who am I kidding couldn't ask me to pay attention
My best dreams were after I had some time to just consider
I took a meeting with my old self
After a few arguments turns out I won
(such a wimp)
Ha, I suppose so, see I told him to move on
Because I already knew that everybody wanted him to be gone
So really what's the point to dwell on the past
Everyone whos in their right mind knows damn well shit won't ever last
(What the fuck do you want me to do, dude)
(Move on because some people said it helps them)
(don't you get, better yet, don't you understand that I miss the past)
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Boundless
lyricsText:
[Ralphy]

Just got this feeling, reaching on my limits
Ain't the sky limit, nah cooking up beginnings
You know how I feel, playing with the feelings
Can't stop, but I'm just tryna be the one who
Finish
Exemplary actions on some figures
Except I'm boundless on goals
You know how it goes, same old same old story we'll see how it goes
I feel it up in the world
People changing around me
Is me, I don't know I feel like a clown see
But I got some goals to complete
Others body members just to compete
I just go ahead
[get up]
Stand on your feet
There's more to life then just appearances and everything you could imagine just you see
Overactive I may be, but being protective is one thing
Driven people from my actions lo siento pardon me
All I wanted was to show you a part of me
A normal side left by, at the same time
Don't just slip by everyday is blessing in disguise or so we say when tough times arrive

[KingJJ]

Everyday is a blessing in disguise
That's what we believe when it be rough
Believe me, I know the grind will be tough
Boundless, as we are, we can't be contained
Nor restrained, you be mistrained
Thinking it's fine to steer into our lane
Got goals that all I want to do was end
Then wake the next day, start it over again
That act of rewind, it's called a new begin
Pickin up my act, pickin up the beat
Fighting in this life to be there for those close to me
That love is infinite, that's why we be boundless
Never let a boundary cross us, and hurt us
Pick up the microphone to rap another lyric
It's not the same cycle though, yeah it never was
Growing up is moving past the peach fuzz, yeah
Every day is gonna be asking the same question
Why do we try, yeah, why do we?
I don't know, it's kinda like we stuck in the same cycle, though
Haha, boundless as we are, we can not be contained nor restrained
Under every line leaves another message
Right or wrong, short or long
Together we can heal, move past the hurt
Cause we boundless (cause we boundless...)

[Ralphy]

Just got this feeling, reaching on my limits
Ain't the sky limit, nah cooking up beginnings
You know how I feel, playing with the feelings
Can't stop, but I'm just tryna be the one who
Finish
Exemplary actions on some figures
Except I'm boundless on goals
You know how it goes, same old same old story we'll see how it goes
([KingJJ]: cause we boundless)
Just got this feeling, reaching on my limits
Ain't the sky limit, nah cooking up beginnings
You know how I feel, playing with the feelings
Can't stop, but I'm just tryna be the one who
Finish
Exemplary actions on some figures
Except I'm boundless on goals
You know how it goes, same old same old story we'll see how it goes
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

Want me to perish on the spot?
That's gon take a lot, awfully hot coffee pot
Man that should just be mild-ish

I'm just a child who don't wanna dish
So yeah guess I am childish

Been called childish
Is that so? Call me Billie Eilish

Clue on why y'all choose
To assume and just zoom on
Wanna hate on me
Just send me a call n'
Dial me up, it's
1-800-IMA-KIDA
Yeah, even my number is against me
Leave behind da old, make new plans

I don't wanna let it stew
But man if I'm a baby

I'm the top dog, or I'm Snoop

Porque se que
Tu eres una idiota

Yo estoy muy bueno
Y tu eres muy estupido
Yeah, can a child go between
English and Spanish?
Nah, pull and English and Spanish
Whoever moves first is-
Wait, I gotta chill
Don't gotta be rockin' hills
Though soon I'ma rack up the bills
'N you be stuck with bills
And yet I'm still

[Chorus]

So childish
Yeah, sorry to abolish what y'all wanted
Want me to perish on the spot?
That's gon take a lot, awfully hot coffee pot
Man that should just be mildish
Wait, that a word? I dunno, let me be
I'm just a child who don't wanna dish
So yeah guess I am childish

[Verse 3]

Wait, I'm back to the chorus
Thought we were past
You know it wouldn't last
Yeah, we gon' blast off
But you weak as a moth
N' you just a sloth
Maybe I am childish
My topics be off script
Yeah, got the wound slit
The hit was from the missed
Shot from my poor aim
Of keeping a conversation to
Where it t'was like

Cry or do not

But bro I'm so

I'm so childish

My topics on that

How much I just say that word

title: Comeback
lyricsText:
[Verse 1]

They thought I was done? Aw, that's cute.
Now I'm steppin' in clean with dirt on my boots.
Been talked down, but done flipped that script,
Now they runnin' my plays like I'm the coach
I was down low, now loud with a purpose,
I've been doubted, now they finna watch me
No gimmicks, I been this, livin' with a mission,
Came from the bottom, now I'm in the right position.
Clock ticks, I don't fold, I stand tall,
Pressure makes gems, I ain't broke, I evolved.
They never saw it, but I got the plan mapped,
Came back better, yeah, I'm built like that
Like I'm built for that, this made me
Now I'm here, everywhere, second year
Finna build up my legacy
"The Cookie Diss" made me, here I stay
(yeah these bars I finna lay)

[Hook]

They said to step, I bounced back.
Took the title, now it's mine, no cap.
That's why I'm King, it fits me.
Too late for you, this my comeback.
They said to step, I bounced back.
Took the title, now it's mine, no cap.
That's why I'm King, it fits me.
Too late for you, this my comeback.

[Verse 2]

Yeah, they laugh at my vision, said it's a phase
Man, you could try harder not to glaze
Cause all that lined up, none gonna faze me
I'm here for myself, don't need fame
Can't believe I'm annoying, well guess what
Y'all the ones who gave the title, I ran wit' it
I come in sick, everyone give recognition
Guess I'm blessed with the gift
I make it all, more than you would
Try to compete with me, you should
Then we would see the winner
Too bad for you, I got the crown
Sure, make everyone frown
But I made "The Talk", the "Studio"
Playin' around, like it ain't my first rodeo
Turns out it is, I'm just too good

[Hook]

They said to step, I bounced back.
Took the title, now it's mine, no cap.
That's why I'm King, it fits me.
Too late for you, this my comeback.
They said to step, I bounced back.
Took the title, now it's mine, no cap.
That's why I'm King, it fits me.
Too late for you, this my comeback.

[Verse 3]

Guess I'm a director, cause I'm real
Like for real, can't lie or deny
All the reasons I shouldn't be here
I get it, I wouldn't wanna lose to me
Take it from me, I suck but still here
Would you rather have a fake or true
I'm the OG, flip it around that where I'm *at*
Yeah the GOAT, showed the ropes
No one will forget the comeback

[Hook]

They said to step, I bounced back.
Took the title, now it's mine, no cap.
That's why I'm King, it fits me.
Too late for you, this my comeback.
They said to step, I bounced back.
Took the title, now it's mine, no cap.
That's why I'm King, it fits me.
Too late for you, this my comeback
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Friendly Fire
lyricsText:
[Intro]

Check, check
We live?
Alright...
(I got the gelato and Cuban tobbaco)
Alright
(enemy spotted)

[Verse 1: KingJJ]

...
Like its warfare
I don't wish you well, this ain't wellfare
Spitting on this battlefield, you in thin air
Look at me, alliance to my country
Ain't that so sweet? Ain't I so sweet?
Look to my left, they fly high, this an explosion
To my right, you jus' exposed for being fake
You had an alience with our country
Didn't see that switch up coming
But now you switched sides, you must be
Years in planning, all just to hurt
That ripple you caused went nuclear
Think I had a sign to shoot me here?
See, you shot at my heart
But not just that, the heart of the country
Now you accuse us of hurting you?
Man, we never even put a scratch
Uh, look at me, mess with me
All this pain, jus' hit a truck into me
Yeah, you the one leaving blows
Yet the one to dodge for our attacks
If only we done had a witness
That could get you to jus' quit this
(Hey, hey, we had some)
(Then how is this a fight?)
(No evidence to prove)
(So it really was just petty?)
Yeah, it was so petty, give me some spaghetti
Vomit on my sweater (wait already?)
Uh, back on track, ya know I never lack
To go and catch my friends backs
When they be stabbed in the back
Kicked down a cliff, wait what's the diff?
My inference is care was not there
More was prolly done for hair
Less care than honey for a bear
You were on our team
I would have never back stabbed (Aw, he cares)
(Wait, I cared), Ha, yeah, right
Learn to pick, your gah dang fight
Time to learn, you weren't ever right
Time to learn you weren't ever right.
Verse 2; (Ralphy)
(Ghost in this... X2)
(okay switch)
Left so quick, out the house
You're silent now, but deadly mouth
...about, with other guys now
Left a friend group, for a night out
You a..., that's spite how
Saying that roles changed, pipe down
Playing victim, for the whole town
Validation girl, to loud
Like a game, man...
Chasing tails, guys figure out
That's what happens, when you... around
(ghost in this... X2)
...up ma homeboy for months now
Know what I meant when I bust
Man aye
Staying on facts now knowing that I won't back down
Hold a grudge for reason no rhyming with reason
Doing some... but passing main part is passion
(from here on a mix of freestyle and inspiration from lil' darkie)

[Outro]

5 years of being friends for what?
Mission failed, we'll get 'em next time
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Gherkin
lyricsText:
[Intro]

This just in: the grave of, who people call "KingJJ", has been found open
"Ayo, give me the mic!"
What's up, y'all? It's yo' boy again
Gherkin, you better watch out (man)

[Verse]

Oh, come on Gherkin, I know you always jerkin'
'cause you never see a lady lurkin'
Lately learnin' you just a master debater,
Well I'm the mater of haters, and you just be a...[beep sfx]
Yeah, prolly better cut that out
Like you should be wit' your diet, jus' try it out
Although I know one thing you won't do,
And that is ever try to work it out (ooh)
And lately (what), I've been (huh)
Watchin' (yeah), learnin' (uh)
Just en-ough to, see (see) that
You just, be (be)
Tryin' so hard to be tough
But I know it's gotta be hard when
You're hitting those aerial shots, huh? (get it?)
(Jordon, we are built the same) Uh, no we ain't
Just listen here, Girk
I may be a potato but you round as a donut
And, unlike you through a door, that fits (why)
'cause you look for attention like them sprinkles on top (up top)
Now I know that you think that we got some chemistry
"But lemme see", ooh, nope, sorry buddy
I don't really tend to swing thag way, jus' you
And Gherkin, I know you depressed
But never pop a perc inside of a Perkins
N' don't lace it, jus' keep bracin' it
'Cause if you die then how are you gonna keep
Filling up your mouth with all that food?
And plus, McDonald's needs you to buy (number one customer)
And Arby's is calling for you (we have the meats)
Jus' never forget yo' girl, the dairy queen
If you ever do, there will be a giant blizzard
Don't worry 'bout your ego, you'll remain seen
And, oh come on, Girk, don't be obscene!
We don't need to see your pants dropped
Nor that one millimeter defeater
To be a repeater to know that you fall short
In expectations, but in reality, you double-c thick (thick!)
So don't worry about it (what the hell JJ)
Oh, you know, a mans gotta do what hes gotta do
To make a livin' against you (ooh)
Yo, I just remembered another thing (the hell)
You talk a lot, even more than me
That's the only thing you got on me
Bet you wish you had that inch more
On you wee-wee, oh tee-hee
Chace, I love you bro
But you won't be worth much
Just a small hunch, but only thing worth numbers
Is that phone number on the scale, yo
Man, do you have any last words Gherkin?
(Hahahaha)
Life is like a box of chocolates, you never know what you're gonna get
Man, we're still talking about food here
Haha, just playing Girk, you know I love you
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Lies
lyricsText:
[Verse 1: Ralphy]

Lo que sigue, mustrales la actuacin. es hora de frijol
Spent too much time thinking about the people
On how I make them feel
But maybe that's the point of life just to turn the wheel
But what point I make is I'm supposed to make appeals
But instead I sit up and wander watch and breathe and heal
I'm sick and tired of all the lies, I promised I tried
But no matter how much, I gave, people still despised
So I come home late at night with tears in my eyes
All just so mama can ask me son, why cry
So I just look and stutter mutter utter shit and lie
Yeah I'ma switch it up a little bit and this is why
Too many people taking advantage of my life
Saying things behind my back with no right
Expecting a rise out of me maybe a fight,
But instead I just bottle it up real tight
To try to not hurt the next person in my sight
So it appears the people in my life have taken advantage of me
So I'm used to that, that's why I don't want no beef
But no matter where I go people always taunt me
Believe me they talk behind you back too
I just wanted to be the one who attempted to warn you
So here it is to my friends thank you
Lo siento Mama y amigos
Gracias a Todo
(Spent too much time thinking about the people
On how I make them feel
But maybe that's the point of life just to turn the wheel
But what point I make is I'm supposed to make appeals
But instead I sit up and wander watch and breathe and heal)
(Spent too much time thinking about the people
On how I make them feel
But maybe that's the point of life just to turn the wheel
But what point I make is I'm supposed to make appeals
But instead I sit up and wander watch and breathe and heal)
(So it appears the people in my life have taken advantage of me
So I'm used to that, that's why I don't want no beef
But no matter where I go people always taunt me
Believe me they talk behind you back too
I just wanted to be the one who attempted to warn you)
So at last the crown shines again

[Verse 2: KingJJ]

I wake up, barely outta bed
Thinking of the hurt, in my head
Wish it's that, I could shed
But I'm glad, we didn't make amends
Yeah, I don't wanna mend
What's been loss
Am I lyin'? False
Still though, left wondering
What's up with all the lies
Everyone be hurting with them goodbyes
I haven't bursted into cries for years
But could barely hold it no more
Now after more thinkin'
I don't care bout the lies
Or the mental demise
From feelin' like I been fried
But what I care bout
Is changing, growing up
Not focused about on I'ma be throwing up, like
Now, done said many times, haters go hike
Now I'ma go off on this track, ay
They say I can't do this no more
"Get a freakin' job, yo' poor
Get some new rhymes, Singapore?"
All this hurt should be known as crime
As y'all just chiming in, I'm packing rhyming in
I got a lack of sleep, but still beat the beat
I've done a lot, not gonna get all caught
In the lies, now here's my goodbye
To the old me, hate you
To the new me, see you
Screw y'all, wouldn't wanna be you
To the few, hope I see you
I put so much into a verse
Don't care if you think it peverse
Bet you would just be worse
Be cooked, just reading the script
See, all the above ain't lies
You could do the same
You hate what happens with 'em
Yet you could drop the act
You actin' outta wack
Man get off my track
Curved into lane, you just my bane
You wanna lie? Get hit by train
This is goodbye, you gonna fry
Don't even try to recover, uh
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Life's a Gamble (prod. by Ralphy)
lyricsText:
[Verse]

Haha
Y'all thought I was serious?
Come on, man
Ain't I childish?
Nah
I'm takin all of this heat
Laying it down hard with the beat
Look at y'all, lookin for a bite to eat
Put that stuff to bed, like holy sheet
If you were me and I was you
I'd put my life together, formal like a book
No need for a catchy hook, you're off it
Bounce back, yeah I got the balls
I see you running down in them halls
I wrote Childish, guess it was meant for you
Call me indifferent, I'm intolerant to the crap
Caught between rock and hard place
I swear I am not gay, keep going with hard haste
I smell you mile away, get you some toothpaste
I'm in distaste, you're in distress
Looking for a place, to get some hard rest
Like how could I just, stay to outlast
All I know is, I'm an outcast
Time to switch it up a lil
What I mean is don't tear it up like a pillow
Not mad enough to list it all
But crazy enough to mess it up
I'm gonna fill this up n call it a recipe
Looking around the party all them next to me
Will I be the next to be on a lil ex, ha, I see
That no one got enough self control, maybe harassed
It's an embarrassment, seeing kids without they parents
Apparently their presence be killing me
Going on a ramble, take a sign to gamble
This is my game, this is my way
Stay or don't stay, say or don't say
I don't care which way, just take the highway
And, ya know...stop being childish
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Motivation
lyricsText:
[Verse]

Running outta motivation
Losing all the alliteration
Smashing to obliteration
Yeah, life is crazy, uh huh
Like I stay Shady, uh huh
But you can't phase me, ain't reach me
Can't breach me, can't dish me
Can't diss me, yeah never hurt me
The previous pain made me go numb
Oh you cooked, yum yum
Oh crap, making my stomach hurt
Like sick all the way down, screw the crown
I avert the situation, alert my imagination
Do all this to keep mentally stable
Wait, that all went down with the fables
Bouta flip all these tables like uh
Wait, stop, man, please, enough
You don't care if my life was rough
Well least I know this ain't scuffed
Yeah, I spit the fact, not the fiction
You plus the ground with the force of friction
I don't got the dictation, but I must station
And just get this case in
Don't care if you based, or
If you hate the pace, well
You can just go through the door, man
Cause you just be a bore, man
They call me Thor with these raps
Well I just take that, reload and spit back
Take this with a pinch of salt
I'ma make your career go full halt
Yeah they don't understand the name I make
They can't understand the game I play
No matter if I run it up, let it stop
All I know is you will never cop
Well man, they call me the Rap King
Lyrically, I stay quite literal, ridicule
Like I just want to be the tallest
Ain't need to be Em, Juice, Lamar,
X, Wayne, Ice, Jay-Z
50, Tupac, Dre, or Future.
I jus wanna be me
But what is me without the motivation
Good question, word to Berg
Gotta understand the Biology,
That is understand how life works
Gotta look it in a scope
Not the label, horse get in the stable
Now listen, I know I messed up
In so many aspects, now jus' get back
Don't need pity, I'll jus get lippy
Now quickly, run, hon, you
Buns, like, no, lie, jus', bye
Ralph
Gotta a lot of ow
But that stuff won't faulter
On my personal I got Jordan shells
Got them people well
But I neva fail
Take em to the bell
Ring ring
Listen to sound
Got em home bound
Never found out
With a brown belt
Bouta crash out
Leave em out
Bout time for lights out
Your gonna play chicken now
Man quit
Taking a strife you can't even hit the switch
But the meaning of life is to be a pain in the bitch
So stand up to the pitch a take a miss
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: No Remorse
lyricsText:
[Verse]

Ralphy (intro)
Sometimes I feel I'm drifting away
Trying to get your love today (sike!)
Ralphy (interlude)
You guys thought that was going to be depressing Mann just wait
And while you listen to this it may not be the greatest thing you've listened to but the best
JJ (verse 1)
You thought I was broken? Nah, just cold now
Took all that pain, now I'm lettin' it go loud
Used to cry in the dark, now I bark in the flame
Same guy you ignored, now remember the name (King!)
Every sorry was fake, every promise was dirt (just broken)
I gave all I had, now I'm done gettin' hurt (not jokin')
No love in my chest, just scars and fuel (yeah!)
They laughed at my dreams, now I'm breakin' the rules
(let's go)
Tired of bein' humble, tired of the silence
I'm the storm they made with their lies and the violence
JJ ain't cryin', nah, JJ evolved
No remorse in my blood, I want it resolved
Spit truth like venom, no peace, no pause
I'm the fire in the booth, I'm the rebel with cause
You pushed me too far, now I'm takin' the lead
Turn my sadness to rage, now I'm built to bleed
Ralphy (verse 2)
People laugh at me for being different I'm talking about color and inference
I'm not so mad to make... but I am mad enough to make...
She said
Yes I understand I was scared
And I wanted people to like me
Because I needed people to want me
And when you treated me good I ran away and I'm sorry
So you're sorry for, me, treating you good but then went after my best friend
And then said it was all good I used you for him
People like this I can't forgive saying It's okay but lying behind a screen that they feel safe in
Not caring about who they might offend
My bad, people don't have a good side
After all, it's all about our feelings
Dying inside to get others appreciation to feel good
Don't worry about the evil that is spilt into bad eggs
Inside we all have cracking points that when tempered might explode
Everything and anyone has a point to where you might snap
JJ (verse 3)
I look in the mirror, I'm the fraud I fear
I talk bold, but I fold, can't stand me near
Fake strength, fake pride, fake grind, fake gear
Can't blame y'all, 'cause I been broke for years
Say I'm real but that's out of my ass
Held back every time that I shoulda swung
Let 'em lie to my face, then I play dumb
How the hell do I survive when I let 'em run
Broke my word more times than I breathed
Said I'd rise, but I fall on repeat
Wanna lead, but I quit on myself
I'm the chain on my neck, I'm the lock, no key
So nah, I don't want your peace
I want war, n' want smoke, want... on the beat
I want... n' want... I want y'all left weak
I want silence after I...
No love left, just war on sight
No calm talk, just rage and spite
No hold back, just for dread, now bite
I got nothing to lose, just wrongs to right
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: One Take
lyricsText:
[Verse]

I move slow, but the growth stay heavy,
Every scar that I earned made my soul stay ready.
Used to dream on the curb, now I write with intent,
Turn my pain to a verse, let the struggle pay rent.
World move fast, but I keep my pace,
Gotta guard my peace like it's home base.
No flash, no chains, no showtime lights,
Just a notepad heart and some long cold nights.
I been lost, I been broke, I been low,
Still I plant them seeds where the rain don't go.
They don't see the roots, just the bloom in the spring,
But I built this crown with invisible strings. I'm a slow burn, don't rush my flame,
Every setback just carved my name.
Take your time, don't fold, don't fade,
Real ones shine when the world throws shade.
Pops gone early, he left me the grind. Said "son, the world cruel but keep peace in your mind." Now I carry his ghost in these rhymes I design. Life taught lessons with a backhand slap. Had to learn self worth in a mirror full of cracks. Now I shine through flaws, break through the collapse. I lost God once now I'm praying come back.
On the microphone I present like a gift, I remember working 9-5 everyday man I hated that shift, can a player get a hit? Probably not but I will never quit, I'm so legit my lyrics have no limit, I'm asking myself where does the road finish? Maybe its my own spirit yeah they hate those critics, Mr Tain here to change what's been the same, no matter you're age watch your family so they can be safe and life could be so great, we all make mistakes but we gotta move on to change our fate, history is yesterday, so I might say goodbye to those nights full of cries, man I need a wife and also need advice, hear me out we the guys!
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Overthinking
lyricsText:
[Verse]

Hate me, hate me, I know that you hate me
I get it, I'm trash, that's just a known fact
I'm sorry for them times I've done messed up
But, girl, please don't ever let up
I don't wanna let go, I'm starting to let go
My mind then enters yet another spiral
Washed up, damn how long is this cycle
Get fucked off a curb (oh shit)
I know that you heard (oh shit)
Man, I'm jus' psycho, haha
Uh, what was I saying (oh yeah)
I know I'm never gonna be the best
But girl trust I would give you bliss
I'd stop but my my mind can't rest
Girl, I'm just here up for the test
Damn already hurt
How long has it been
I was at a low
But you gave me a hand
I know I should be fine and dandy
I should just move on, but man, me?
Give an overthinker a piece of mind and
They'll just want that whole damn pie
And man that ain't no lie
But then she say bye
And I'm left lying
Felt like I'm dying
Why am I trying
Already tried disguising
But there ain't any hiding
(Man I thought she was my girl
I'm sorry for all the mistakes
I took my issues and add 'em in
So now its gone and man I'm in
So much stress, its distress, what a mess)
Man I'm jus' a psycho
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Prowess
lyricsText:
[Ralphy]

My rhymes are like a full deck of raps and a rat trap full of lead astray
Know what I mean like how people run away
Hiding the screens looking, acting up on the display
Call me an essay for not knowing the name
Sorry, sorry you know it's okay to them mistakes
But me I'm different my skills never decay
Because guess what, I could give fuck less of what people even have to say
So taking them away by not leading people to feel like strays
At least that's what I think people would want me to say
Like I said in the past I'm leaving out people's names
To really care about their mental health to make sure they're okay
So I So I lay in the bed to awake
JJ
My rhymes locked and loaded like a sniper
My range goes so far that y'all couldn't ever catch up
Call it mental issues when I spit about my feelings
I'm in the booth going off, y'all broke a tooth from trying to mimic
It's not a gimmick, it's my life, fuck the price
Y'all couldn't ever rub off, closest you get is lice
I spend my life trying to jot down my words
When I speak I tend to stumble then slur
Taking my time with the lyrics
Y'all could never beat this
Y'all could never reach this
My experiences are what lead to my expertise
(Man y'all are the experts, please)
Anyway, anyway, I guess I just arose from my slumber
None of these girls asking for my number
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Return of the King-Child
lyricsText:
(interlude ft. ralphy)
Yeah, I'm back, and I'm on the attack
I'd left the throne empty, it was months since
Had to give myself a break, that's called a mental rinse
Mouth going on with lyrical dispense, though I would spit nonsense
That's about the cents I make, but hey times done had changed
Then I was nothin, now ima start a buisiness
Running these streets wit my cartel
I'm spitting this bit, keep the game lit
Wait, but how long had it been? (6 7 months)
(Nah, get out of here, its been 4 months)
Ooh, yeah, doing this
Boo, yeah, keep it coming
I seen the Instagram, "kingjjstudiosh8ters"
I've been on hiatus, that don't stop the haters
You come at me with a diss track?
Maaaan, look at how then tables turned
Nah ain't jus that they full on flipped
But if you come at me with diss
I hope you know that you will always miss
Doing this stuff and I hope you miffed
Solvin this case is as easy as House
Cause I been in the house
I'd love to see you in a blouse
And aye don't think I forgot about yous
Yeah, that's plural, mentally I've been havin booze
To get you off my mind, of course not literal
(freestyle)

[Interlude]

I just think you suck
The fuck? Got hit by truck
Now in a rut, I'm still here stuck
Damn right, just gotta aim foward
Let me keep it simple in four, wait five words
Motherfuckin cocksucker you just suck
Ima always stay up here in my legacy
I wish I had known we werent meant to be
Oh no, a robbery is his destiny!
Guess I mean it start some drama theme
And then I'd become like them, but
Nah, I wouldn't turn to crime for the world
Never use myself to disrespect my kind
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Takin' the Throne
lyricsText:
[Intro]

Takin' the top (yah yah)
Tickin' the clock (yah yah)
Waitin' for the lot (yah yah)
Shootin' my shot (yah yah)
Pullin' the rhymes (yah yah)
Goin' to town (yah yah)
Makin' it big (yah yah)
Nothin' to lose (yah)

[Interlude]

Back on the grind
Takin' my time
Work on myself
A lot to prove
Back with my moves
Made it all
Still nothin' to lose
Lost my fight
Gotta earn back
Comeback
Can't lose
Without motivation
The throne stays my goal
Came from rags to riches

[Verse]

I'm drivin', eyes lyin'
Can't believe what I see
Road rage turned bad, wasn't even tryin'
Guess I'm the next to be
Pulled over, crash out
Get asked "what", lash out
Rolled over, escape artist
Not reached by trap artists
"Uh, who made it farthest?"
Team effort, not alone
Wear the crown in the town
You in gown, up then down
Stop sign, full halt
My skills? Pole vault
Still can't reach, nor can breach
Bro say "woo-hoo", you "boo-hoo"
I live by many names
The King, JJ, Top of Throne,
EGlue, 'cause cold as igloo
Yeah, you choose
No matter what, you lose
The throne is my Studio
No matter what, ain't my first rodeo

[Interlude]

Back on the grind
Takin' my time
Work on myself
A lot to prove
Back with my moves
Made it all
Still nothin' to lose
Lost my fight
Gotta earn back
Comeback
Can't lose
Without motivation
The throne stays my goal
Came from rags to riches

[Verse]

Started out slow
Didn't know flow
Fumbled my lines
Now I got shine
Used to be trash
Now I spit fast
Wasn't that great
Now I bend fate
They laughed at my name
Now it bang like a flame
KingJJ the truth
Didn't peak in my youth
Back then I was shaky
Now clean, never flaky
Mic in my grip
No more loose lips
I clown on myself
Then turn to my wealth
I doubted my art
Now I chart like a dart
On target I land
They don't understand
Said I won't make it
Now I just take it
Still got some flaws
But I break laws
Now who got the juice
Me, Ralphy, and Pook
We came from the mud
Turned sweat into flood
Studio the throne
We claim it alone
All of us kings
Don't need fake bling
Legacy real
Can't copy this feel
I'm up, you snooze
I win, you lose
Thought I was down
But I rose like the crown
They thought I was finished
But I just replenished
Built from the struggle
Now strength got doubled
Went from the bottom
Now look where I brought 'em
They counted me out
Now they scream and shout
They slept on the name
Now I'm deep in the game
No cap, no gimmicks
All heart, no limits
Lights flash, I glow
Right when the beat drop, go

[Interlude]

Back on the grind (yah yah)
Takin' my time
Work on myself (yah yah)
A lot to prove
Back with my moves (yah yah)
Made it all
Still nothin' to lose (yah yah)
Lost my fight
Gotta earn back (yah yah)
Comeback
Can't lose (yah yah)
Without motivation
The throne stays my goal (yah yah)
Came from rags to riches (yah)

title: The Cookie Diss
lyricsText:
[Intro]

Yo, what's up gang
It's yo boy, JJ
We gon be dissing on Cookie today
This is bouta be lit (Yeah, Yeah, Yeah)

[Verse 1]

What's up bro
Wanna know why I am the way I be
I could care less what people think
You see, I can say stupid stuff all day
But nothing can compare with your hair
It's a look I can't even bare
Like bro your a red head
And come on you shoulda fled
Cause you know I can rap better than you
I might be like "Chika Chika Slim Shady"
But you just be a big baby

[Chorus]

Yo boy JJ bouta get that dub
And you Cookie gon be thrown in the tub
When you be hearing this
Just know you deserve the diss
Come on bro, I don't miss

[Verse 2]

Yo Cook bouta end your career
Your diss be smelling like piss
It's about as good as your rear
You gonna be dropping a tear
Just like it gon be with **** (Dang)
Yeah my vocals be soaring in the air, for real (Wow)
It'll be me that gon put you in dismay
And I bouta be shouting heyy (Heyy)

[Chorus]

Yo boy JJ bouta get that dub
And you Cookie gon be thrown in the tub
When you be hearing this
Just know you deserve the diss
Come on bro, I don't miss

[Verse 3]

Cook you be thinkin your him
But after this you gon be hangin by a limb
Cause you try messing with me
Even though that happened to you
The funny thing is you think your hair be cool
But you don't even have a good fade
Worse than that is it be worse than your grades (Dang)

[Chorus]

Yo boy JJ bouta get that dub
And you Cookie gon be thrown in the tub
When you be hearing this
Just know you deserve the diss
Come on bro, I don't miss

title: UNSTABLE
lyricsText:
[Intro]

Uh huh (King on the beat)
Haha...going crazy wit this one!

[Hook]

Aye, man, I'm going unstable
Can't lie, no lie, going unstable
Insane, in aim, fuck games
Lil' Wayne, in lane, going unstable

[Verse]

All of this talk goes to make me nauseous
Pizza in my mind, I stood n' couldn't sauce it
Wait what, the fuck, do I, go on
I don't, got a, clue wait, hold up (wait)
Too late, my mind is racin' n' pacin'
Alive or for dead, waiting for the mic n'
Don't mean push y'all away, like farther (haha)
Yeah, how's that for double entendre
Haha, now you up a wall, I'm pushing (yuh)
You easy to beat up, like a cushion
Aye, still wanna dock me for an entendre
I know English all through my mind (yo)
Sick of me, jus' not enough of my kind, yo
Bickering, muttering, fluttering
It's not in, it's outta pocket
Locked in, like Compton (loaded)
Ready for all that competition
Aye, still call me a magician
Cast a spell, poof, away to your career
Haha, was it ever there

[Hook]

Aye, man, I'm going unstable
Can't lie, no lie, going unstable
Insane, in aim, fuck games
Lil' Wayne, in lane, going unstable
Aye, man, I'm going unstable
Can't lie, no lie, going unstable
Insane, in aim, fuck games
Lil' Wayne, in lane, going unstable

[Verse]

Look at me snap, yeah, I'm breakin' my chain
Unstable mind with that permanent stain
Voices in my head like, "King, do it again"
So I spit venom, no need for a pen
Rippin' through beats, like teeth to a feast
A beast with no leash, my rage unleashed
Glass in my path but I'm runnin' it fast
Cuts on my feet but I'm built to last
Doubt me once, you get buried in smoke
Laugh in your face while I'm crackin' a joke
Switch up my tone then I switch up my flow
Dark in my eyes but I'm ready to blow
No calm, no chill, no break in my will
Knockin' down doors just to sharpen my skill
King with the crown but my mind in a cell
Yeah, I'm unstable, straight outta mothafuckin hell

[Hook]

Aye, man, I'm going unstable
Can't lie, no lie, going unstable
Insane, in aim, fuck games
Lil' Wayne, in lane, going unstable (haha)
Aye, man, I'm going unstable
Can't lie, no lie, going unstable
Insane, in aim, fuck games
Lil' Wayne, in lane, going unstable (haha)

[Verse]

Broke like a twig with the pressure applied
Fire through my veins when I'm dead inside
Burn up the booth, watch it turn into ash
You throwin' stones? I'm throwin' 'em back
Hatin' my name, yeah, I'm buildin' the brand
Talkin' that shit while you stay where you stand
Bleedin' these bars like they cut to my core
Got demons I feed when I step in the door
Mad with the pen, yeah, I scribble your fate
Finally got a smile when I sharpen the blade
Don't test a mind that's ready to snap
Jaw finna be dropped with this rap
King in the dark, still unstable as hell
Never box me in, can't wish me well
I'm breakin' this mirror, past is lost
One side sane but the other lives on

[Hook]

Aye, man, I'm going unstable
Can't lie, no lie, going unstable
Insane, in aim, fuck games
Lil' Wayne, in lane, going unstable
Aye, man, I'm going unstable
Can't lie, no lie, going unstable
Insane, in aim, fuck games
Lil' Wayne, in lane, going unstable
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Wake Up
lyricsText:
[Intro]

Why do you wake up, and always decide to hurt me
Why do I wake up, and always decide to try again

[Interlude]

Nah, enough of the hurt, time to wake up
Take a look in the mirror, take off the make up
Life is all made up, I don't wanna hate them
I just gotta hate them, nah, cut the crap
You know well that I gotta rap, it's not a wrap
You send it down like crap, chicken go flap
Back bawk, get a life, cut the knife
Nah, screw the knife and wake up

[Verse]

Takin a cut at your issues ain't a fix
Believe me, I know pain when I see it
But it's like Tae said, we got Pain and Purpose
Kinda like Yin Yang, bing bang, ching chang
They need each other, we need each other
(we had each other)
Past is the past, we knew it wouldn't last
It was fragile, like Tupperware
Got ****** there, I lost here
Switching up the flow like how people switch up
Got two sides to them like a light switch
I guess I'm just fed up with these lil' jerks
Who thinks it's fine to go to TikTok and just cry
Then go to their friends and go to accuse
Man, all this work just to amuse
All this clickbait, and the clip farm
Is it really friends under views
(set your priorities)

[Interlude]

(kinda like Yin Yang, bing bang, ching chang
They need each other, we need each other)
(we had each other) Okay, now wake up
(we had each other) Okay, now wake up
(we- we- we had each other) Wake up
(had each other) Okay, now wake up
(had- had- had each other) Wake up
(we had each other) Come on man, it's time to wake up

[Verse]

Okay, snap, it's time to wake up
Take a look in the window, it's time to realize
That for the real lives, you gotta calm down
Life is a full circle, that's the circle of life
You use a tool, let's say a knife
And cut the rope, that makes the circle
The cycle is over, but not the right one
To exit the cycle of pain you gotta work around
Go over or down, same for the people
That go just to torment, ain't no shortening it
Huh, guess there is a point for the music
That I wake to make, ain't a Take and Bake
Just go n' grab your rake, take all your pain
Put it in a pile, then burn those leaves
While the smoke stays the issues are gone
Then realize that life is just to right your wrongs

[Interlude]

Why do you wake up, and always decide to hurt me
Why do I wake up, and always decide to try again
(rewind of the last two lines)

[Verse]

Nah, rewind that crap, don't tell yourself that
It's kinda like golf, you can take a shot a hundred times
And you still need practice, go for a thousand
And you will get better
Moral of the story is that
Everyone has a reason to wake up
So don't tell yourself that you don't
'Casue I know you do
You just need to find it

[Outro]

It's time to wake up, and change for the best
It's time to wake up, and be glad to try again
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.

title: Was It All Just Pretend?
lyricsText:
[Verse 1]

[Cookie] I've been thinking 'bout you late at night
Every time I close my eyes, you're still on my mind
I'm stuck in your web, can't break free
I wish I knew she lied to me

[Pre-Chorus]

I let it slide, I let it pass
But now I see the truth at last
I'm looking back, I'm feeling betrayed
I wish I knew the games you played

[Chorus]

I wish I knew she lied to me
Maybe then I wouldn't still be waiting
Caught up in all your fantasies
Now I see the way you've been faking

[Verse 2]

You kept me hanging on the line
While I thought you'd be mine, I thought you'd be mine
But now the truth is clear to see
I wish I knew she lied to me

[Bridge]

I thought we had something real
But it was just the way you made me feel
You never cared, you never tried
Now I see it in your eyes

[Chorus]

I wish I knew, the truth back then,
Maybe I wouldn't be stuck again,
Caught in lies, not love, pretend,
Now I see, you just played pretend,

[Verse 3]

Yeah, you was bluffin'
Tried to act like my heart meant somethin'
I played along, gave in, no frontin'
But I ain't down to keep on runnin'
You made me feel like I was dreamin'
Shoulda dipped when I caught that feelin'
It felt too clean
Like a perfect scene
Now I gotta go, you ain't my queen
Quit the chase, don't cause a scene
Go hike, go skate
Girl, try a new fate
I'm not the one,
I didn't start the drama that made this hate
So go, don't wait
Just head for the gate

[Outro]

I wish I knew she lied to me
I wish I knew she lied to me
Now I'm free&
credits: Performed by KingJJ. Presented by Kings Music.
